result.text:
Time to hook our fellow Chimpers up with some Dojo style this week! 🫡

I’m giving away:

🎁 1 Dojo Bundle (3 embroidered t-shirts)
🎁 2 Master Chimpo Plushies

To enter: Quote RT this post and share your favorite thing about the Chimpers ecosystem! 🔥

I’ll be picking 3 winners this Friday!
